ddls:
CREATE TABLE "desserts" (
  "dessert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dessert */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dessert */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dessert */,
  "serving_size" TEXT /* Serving size for the nutritional information (e.g., 100g) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the dessert (e.g., ice cream, cake, pie) */,
  "cuisine" TEXT /* Cuisine or style of the dessert */,
  "is_vegetarian" INTEGER /* Indicates if the dessert is vegetarian */,
  "is_vegan" INTEGER /* Indicates if the dessert is vegan */,
  "is_gluten_free" INTEGER /* Indicates if the dessert is gluten-free */,
  "is_kosher" INTEGER /* Indicates if the dessert is kosher */,
  "is_halal" INTEGER /* Indicates if the dessert is halal */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the dessert image */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of a video related to the dessert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dessert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nutrition_facts" (
  "fact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nutrition fact */,
  "dessert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dessert this fact belongs to */,
  "calories" REAL /* Number of calories in the dessert per serving */,
  "fat" REAL /* Amount of fat in the dessert per serving */,
  "carbohydrates" REAL /* Amount of carbohydrates in the dessert per serving */,
  "protein" REAL /* Amount of protein in the dessert per serving */,
  "iron" REAL /* Percentage of iron in the dessert per serving */,
  "sugar" REAL /* Amount of sugar in the dessert per serving */,
  "fiber" REAL /* Amount of fiber in the dessert per serving */,
  "sodium" REAL /* Amount of sodium in the dessert per serving */,
  "cholesterol" REAL /* Amount of cholesterol in the dessert per serving */,
  "vitamin_a" REAL /* Percentage of Vitamin A in the dessert per serving */,
  "vitamin_c" REAL /* Percentage of Vitamin C in the dessert per serving */,
  "calcium" REAL /* Percentage of calcium in the dessert per serving */,
  "potassium" REAL /* Amount of potassium in the dessert per serving */,
  "allergens" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of allergens (e.g., nuts, gluten) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nutrition_facts_dessert_id FOREIGN KEY ("dessert_id") REFERENCES desserts ("dessert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ingredients" (
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ingredient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the ingredient */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ingredient */,
  "nutritional_value" TEXT /* Brief nutritional value of the ingredient */,
  "allergen" INTEGER /* Indicates if the ingredient is an allergen */,
  "is_organic" INTEGER /* Indicates if the ingredient is organic */,
  "is_fair_trade" INTEGER /* Indicates if the ingredient is fair trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ingredient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dessert_ingredients" (
  "dessert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dessert */,
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ingredient used in the dessert */,
  "quantity" TEXT /* Quantity of the ingredient used in the dessert (e.g., 100g, 1 cup) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dessert_id", "ingredient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user (city, country) */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has administrative privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "dessert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dessert being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the dessert (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the review was uploaded */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes the review has received */,
  "not_helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of not helpful votes the review has received */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "user_nickname" TEXT /* Nickname of the user (for display purposes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_dessert_id FOREIGN KEY ("dessert_id") REFERENCES desserts ("dessert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
